notableEvents.label: Fielding error

notableEvents.label: Teoscar Hernández GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Teoscar Hernández grounds into a double play, second baseman Edouard Julien to shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to first baseman Troy Johnston. Freddie Freeman out at 2nd. Teoscar Hernández out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Brennan Bernardino picks off Alex Call at 1st on throw to first baseman Troy Johnston.

notableEvents.label: Will Smith pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Will Smith singles on a ground ball to second baseman Edouard Julien.
